description: Canonical advertising-claim categories for Regulation Corpus classification.

categories.name: Health Claims
categories.description: General health, wellness, and nutritional benefit claims.

categories.name: Medical Claims
categories.description: Disease treatment, cure, prevention, and therapeutic claims.

categories.name: Environmental Claims
categories.description: Green, sustainability, and environmental impact claims.

categories.name: Certification
categories.description: Certification, standards, awards, and accreditation references.

categories.name: Safety Claims
categories.description: Product safety, hazard, and risk-related claims.

categories.name: Performance Claims
categories.description: Quantitative performance, efficacy, and results claims.

categories.name: Consumer Protection
categories.description: Fair trading, misleading conduct, and consumer rights.

categories.name: AI-generated Content
categories.description: AI-rendered imagery, synthetic media, and disclosure requirements.

categories.name: Image Usage
categories.description: Before/after, transformation imagery, and visual substantiation.

categories.name: Mandatory Disclaimers
categories.description: Sponsored content identification and required disclosures.
